name: composio
description: Use the Composio CLI from Codex to discover, connect, and act across 1,000+ apps with managed authentication.

interface.shortDescription: Use the Composio CLI across 1,000+ apps
interface.longDescription: Discover and call tools just in time across 1,000+ apps, including Slack, GitHub, Gmail, Notion, and Linear. The bundled Composio CLI skill guides account linking, schema inspection, safe execution, and multi-app workflows.
defaultPrompt: Summarize my unread email and draft replies.
Turn new GitHub issues into Linear tickets.
Find this week's meetings and post a Slack brief.
